Package recoder.kit

package recoder.kit
This package contains the RECODER transformation framework. The auxiliary "kit" classes contain queries and factory methods, while high level transformations are subclasses of Transformation. Transformations report possible problems; specialized problem reports are collected in the recoder.kit.transformation package.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    recoder
    This package contains some basic definitions.
    recoder.kit.pattern
    This package contains classes that model design patterns; it is far from being stable and will be subject to changes.
    recoder.kit.transformation
    This package contains transformation command objects and associated problem reports.
  • Class
    Description
    CommentKit
     
    Conflict
    Problem report indicating that the planned transformation produces a conflict with existing model elements.
    DifferentReturnTypeOverwrite
    Problem report indicating that a method has been overwritten with a different return type.
    Equivalence
    Problem report indicating that the planned transformation is applicable and will not change the functional behavior of the program.
    ExpressionKit
     
    FinalOverwrite
    Problem report indicating that a member has been overwritten that was declared final, or was in a final type.
    Identity
    Problem report indicating that the planned transformation is redundant.
    IllegalInterfaceMember
    Problem report indicating that a member declaration is not a valid member of an interface.
    IllegalName
    Problem report indicating that a chosen name is illegal, for instance a keyword.
    MethodKit
    This class implements auxiliary method related operations.
    MiscKit
    This utility class provides queries, factory methods and transformations on abstract entities that do not fall into one of the abstraction categories (Types, Variables and so on).
    MissingSources
    Problem report indicating that the planned transformation is not possible due to missing sources.
    MissingTypeDeclarations
    Problem report indicating that certain class types have no source representation.
    ModifierKit
    this class implements basic functions for modifier handling.
    MorePrivateOverwrite
    Problem report indicating that a method has been overwritten with a lower visibility.
    NameClashException
    this class implements basic functions for type handling.
    NameConflict
    Problem report indicating that the planned transformation produces a name conflict with an existing model element.
    NameGenerator
    Generator for variable and method names creating an unbound series of names derived from short cut versions of the base name or by enumeration.
    NonStaticOverwrite
    Problem report indicating that a static method has been overwritten with a non-static version.
    NoProblem
    Problem report returned by the analysis phase of a Transformation indicating that the planned transformation is applicable.
    PackageKit
    this class implements basic functions for package handling.
    Problem
    Problem report returned by the analysis phase of a Transformation indicating that the planned transformation is not applicable.
    ProblemReport
    Problem report returned by the analysis phase of a Transformation.
    StatementKit
     
    StatementKit.ControlFlowWalker
    This walker performs a depth first search and reports the reachable statements in the body of the given member.
    Transformation
    Default implementation of a transformation command object.
    TwoPassTransformation
    A two-pass transformation is a nice special case of a transformation, where all subtransformations do not conflict, or where conflicts between them can be resolved locally.
    TypeKit
    this class implements basic functions for type handling.
    UncoveredExceptionsOverwrite
    Problem report indicating that a method has been overwritten with a version that offers more strict exceptions.
    UnitKit
     
    VariableKit
    this class implements basic functions for type reference handling.
